title: quercus × rechinii
intro: Quercus × rechinii, also known as the oak cross hybrid or sessile oak, is a unique plant resulting from a cross between the English oak (Quercus robur) and the sessile oak (Quercus petraea). This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which contains tannins and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus × rechinii include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Quercus × rechinii involve brewing its bark as a tea, or using it in tincture form to extract its medicinal properties.
